debug_info.goal:
case inr.refine_2
G : Type u
inst✝³ : AddCommGroup G
inst✝² : Fintype G
ε : ℝ
q : ℕ
inst✝¹ : Module (ZMod q) G
A₁ A₂ S : Finset G
α : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
hq₃ : 3 ≤ q
hq : Nat.Prime q
hα₀ : 0 < α
hα₂ : α ≤ 2⁻¹
hε₀ : 0 < ε
hε₁ : ε ≤ 1
hαA₁ : α ≤ ↑A₁.dens
hαA₂ : α ≤ ↑A₂.dens
x✝ : MeasurableSpace G := ⊤
this✝⁴ : Fact (1 < q)
this✝³ : DiscreteMeasurableSpace G
hA₁✝ : A₁.Nonempty
hA₂ : A₂.Nonempty
hα₁ : α ≤ 1
this✝² : 0 ≤ log α⁻¹
this✝¹ : 0 ≤ log (ε * α)⁻¹
hS : S.Nonempty
hA₁ : ↑(A₁.addConst univ) ≤ α⁻¹
k : ℕ := ⌈1 + log (ε * α / 4)⁻¹⌉₊
hk₀ : 0 < k
T : Finset G
hTcard : α⁻¹ ^ (-4096 * ↑⌈1 + log (min 1 (↑A₂.card / ↑S.card))⁻¹⌉ * ↑k ^ 2 / ε ^ 2) * ↑univ.card ≤ ↑T.card
hTε : ↑‖mu T ∗^ k ∗ (mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂) - mu A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ mu A₂‖_[⊤] ≤ ε
hT : T.Nonempty
Δ : Finset (AddChar G ℂ) := largeSpec (mu T) 2⁻¹
V : Submodule (ZMod q) G := (AddSubgroup.toZModSubmodule q) (⨅ γ ∈ Δ, γ.toAddMonoidHom.ker)
V' : Finset G := (↑V).toFinset
this✝ : ∑ x ∈ S, (mu V' ∗ mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x = V'.expect fun x => (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x
this : ∑ x ∈ S, (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x = (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0
⊢ |∑ x ∈ S, (mu (↑V).toFinset ∗ mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (mu A₁ ∗ mu A₂) x| ≤ ε

      _ ≤ ↑‖μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂)‖_[⊤] := by

            simpa using this

      _ ≤ ‖μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)‖_[⊤] := by
            simpa using (MeasureTheory.abs_sub_le_wLpNorm_top (f := μ_[ℝ] V' ∗
              (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) (g := (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) (x := (0 : G)))
      _ ≤ ε := by
            simpa [V', conv_iterate, conv_assoc, dconv_eq_conv] using hTε

have hV' : V'.Nonempty := by
      simpa [V'] using (Submodule.nonempty (V : Set G)).to_subtype
    have hVcard : (0 : ℝ) < (V'.card : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast Finset.card_pos.2 hV'
    have hVcard' : (0 : ℝ) < ((Fintype.card G : ℝ) : ℝ) := by
      exact_mod_cast Fintype.card_pos_iff.2 ⟨0⟩
    have hμV' : ‖(μ (V') : G → ℝ)‖_[⊤] ≤ 1 := by
      simpa [mu, Finset.sup_le_iff, hVcard.le] using (mu_le_one (s := V') (R := ℝ) (G := G))
    calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
          = |𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
              simp [this✝, this, sub_eq_add_neg, Finset.expect_sub_distrib]
      _ ≤ 𝔼 x ∈ V', ‖(μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0‖ := by
          simpa using (Finset.abs_expect_le_expect_abs (s := V') (f := fun x =>
            (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0))
      _ ≤ ε := by
          simpa using hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
          = |(𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x) - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
              simpa [this, this_1]
      _ ≤ ε := by
          simpa using (le_trans (by
            simpa [wLpNorm_top] using hTε) (le_rfl))

have h0 : (0 : G) ∈ V' := by
      simpa [V', Submodule.zero_mem] using (Set.mem_toFinset (s := (↑V : Set G))).2 (by
        simpa using (Submodule.zero_mem V))
    have hmain :
        |∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
          = |(𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x) - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
      simp [this, this_1]
    rw [hmain]
    have := (abs_sub_expect_le_sup_norm_sub_expect (μ := μ) (s := V') (f := fun x => (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x) h0)
    exact this.trans hTε

have hμ : μ_[ℝ] V' = μ V' := by simp
    have hSμ : (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0 = ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x := by
      simpa [this] using congrArg id this.symm
    have hε := hTε
    have hk : (1 : ℕ) ≤ k := Nat.succ_le_iff.2 hk₀
    have hε' :
        ‖μ T ∗^ 1 ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂‖_[⊤] ≤ ε := by
      simpa using (le_trans (by
        simpa using
          (AlmostPeriodicity.linfty_almost_periodicity_boosted_mono_k
            (ε := ε) (k₁ := 1) (k₂ := k) hk (T := T) (A₁ := A₁) (S := S) (A₂ := A₂) hTε)) hTε)
    have hε'' :
        ‖μ T ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂‖_[⊤] ≤ ε := by
      simpa [MeasureTheory.convolution_iterate_one] using hε'
    have hε''' :
        ‖μ V' ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂‖_[⊤] ≤ ε := by
      simpa [V', hμ] using hε''
    have hpoint :
        |(μ V' ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂)) 0| ≤ ε := by
      have := MeasureTheory.abs_le_of_wLpNorm_le_top (f := μ V' ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) - μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂)
        (μ := μ univ) hε'''
      simpa using this 0
    have hrewrite1 :
        (μ V' ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂)) 0 = ∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x := by
      simp [dconv_indicate, conv_assoc]
    have hrewrite2 :
        (μ A₁ ∗ 𝟭 S ∗ μ A₂) 0 = ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x := by
      simp [dconv_indicate, conv_assoc]
    have :
        |∑ x ∈ S, (μ V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x| ≤ ε := by
      simpa [hrewrite1, hrewrite2, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hpoint
    simpa [V'] using this

have hV : (V' : Set G).Nonempty := by
      refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
      simpa [V'] using (Submodule.zero_mem V)
    have hμV : (μ (V' : Finset G)) 0 = 1 / (card G : ℝ) := by
      simp [mu, hV, V', Submodule.zero_mem]
    calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
          = |(𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
            simp [this, this✝]
      _ = |((μ (V' : Finset G) ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) 0) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
            simp [expect_eq_conv_mu]
      _ = |((μ (V' : Finset G) ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) 0)| := by
            simp [sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc, sub_eq_add_neg, conv_add,
              conv_neg, add_sub_assoc]
      _ ≤ ‖μ (V' : Finset G) ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) - (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)‖_[⊤] := by
            simpa using MeasureTheory.abs_le_wLpNorm_top (f := μ (V' : Finset G) ∗ (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) -
              (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) (x := (0 : G))
      _ ≤ ε := by
            simpa [V', conv_assoc] using hTε
simpa [this✝, this, abs_sub_comm, sub_eq_add_neg] using hTε

have hV' : V'.Nonempty := by
      simpa [V'] using (Submodule.zero_mem V : (0 : G) ∈ (V : Set G))
    have hmain :
        |(𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x) - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| ≤ ε := by
      simpa [V', hV'] using (linfty_drc hTε)
    simpa [this, this_1] using hmain

have h0 : (0 : G) ∈ V' := by
      simpa [V'] using (Submodule.zero_mem V)
    have :
        |∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x| =
          |𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
      simp [this✝, this, Finset.expect_sub_distrib, h0]
    rw [this]
    exact AlmostPeriodicity.linfty_almost_periodicity_boosted_conclusion hTε

have hV' : V'.Nonempty := by
      classical
      simpa [V'] using (Submodule.zero_mem V)
    have hγ : (2 : ℝ)⁻¹ ≤ (C := (Set.toFinset V)).dens := by
      classical
      simpa [Δ, V', V] using (largeSpec_le_dens (μ := μ T) (by norm_num : (0:ℝ) < 2⁻¹))
    have hγ' : (0 : ℝ) < (2 : ℝ)⁻¹ := by norm_num
    have hAC :
        ε ≤
          |card G * ⟪μ_[ℝ] (Set.toFinset V) ∗ μ (Set.toFinset V), μ (Set.toFinset V)⟫_[ℝ] - 1| := by
      simpa using (le_of_eq (by ring))
    have hmain :=
      global_dichotomy (G := G) (A := (Set.toFinset V)) (C := (Set.toFinset V))
        (hA := hV') (hγC := hγ) (hγ := hγ') (hAC := hAC)
    have : ε / (2 * card G) ≤ ‖balance (μ_[ℝ] (Set.toFinset V)) ○ balance (μ (Set.toFinset V))‖_[↑(2 * ⌈𝓛 ((2 : ℝ)⁻¹)⌉₊), μ univ] :=
      hmain
    have : ε / (2 * card G) ≤ 0 := le_trans this (by positivity)
    have hε : ε ≤ 0 := by
      have : 0 < (2 * (card G : ℝ)) := by positivity
      have := (div_le_iff₀ this).1 this
      simpa using this
    exact (hε₀.not_le hε).elim

have hV' : V'.Nonempty := by
      classical
      simpa [V', Set.toFinset_nonempty] using (show (0 : G) ∈ (V : Set G) from by simp)
    have hμV' : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (μ_[ℝ] V') 0 := by
      classical
      simp [mu, hV', card_ne_zero_of_nonempty, div_nonneg]
    calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
          = |(μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) 0 - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
            simp [this, this✝, expect_eq_sum]
      _ = |((μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) 0| := by
            simp [Pi.sub_apply]
      _ ≤ ‖(μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)) - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S)‖_[⊤] := by
            simpa using (MeasureTheory.abs_le_wLpNorm_top (μ := (μ : Measure G)) _ 0)
      _ ≤ ε := by
            simpa [conv_assoc] using hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
          = |𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
            simp [this, this✝, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc]
      _ ≤ ε := by
            simpa [V'] using hTε

calc
      |∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] V' ∗ μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x - ∑ x ∈ S, (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂) x|
          = |(𝔼 x ∈ V', (μ A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) x) - (μ_[ℝ] A₁ ∗ μ A₂ ○ 𝟭 S) 0| := by
            simpa [this, this✝]
      _ ≤ ε := by
            simpa using hTε
